message:
fix: workload-aware Fragment DO fan-out instead of hardcoded threshold

Replace `fragments.length > 4` with a heuristic based on estimated rows
after pruning. Fan out only when total rows > 100K AND ≥ 2 fragments —
avoids RPC overhead on small scans while scaling parallelism with data.

Like GPU dispatch: don't launch a kernel for 10 values, but do for 1M.
